phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (Applied Finance & Compliance)
phdOffers.subject: Industry-linked PhD researching digital finance innovations: tokenisation, automated market makers, pricing models, and the legal/compliance landscape of smart contracts and regulated digital markets.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a. tax-free stipend for 3.5 years; tuition fee offset; $10,000 project training package; industry placement.
phdOffers.notes: Applications accepted at any time via DFCRC. Partner universities include Macquarie, UNSW, UTS, UWA, Curtin, Wollongong.

phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (Compliance & Applied Finance)
phdOffers.subject: Applied research on financial markets 3.0 with focus areas including applied finance, digital finance compliance/regulation, and blockchain-enabled market infrastructure.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a. tax-free; tuition fee offset; industry placement; 3.5 years.
phdOffers.notes: UTS page lists STATUS: Open; applications at any time.

phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (UNSW)
phdOffers.subject: CRC-funded industry PhD on digital finance, tokenisation, compliance frameworks, and financial market infrastructure.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a. tax-free stipend; tuition offset; industry placement.
phdOffers.notes: UNSW listed as DFCRC partner university.

phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (UWA)
phdOffers.subject: Industry PhD on applied finance, digital finance law/compliance, or blockchain/data solutions for regulated financial markets.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a.; tuition fee scholarship; $10,000 training package; 3.5 years.
phdOffers.notes: UWA page lists opportunity status Open.

phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (Curtin)
phdOffers.subject: Digital finance CRC industry PhD covering applied finance, compliance/regulation of digital assets, and supporting technologies.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a. stipend; tuition offset; industry placement.
phdOffers.notes: Curtin listed as DFCRC partner.

phdOffers.title: Industry PhD Scholarship – Digital Finance CRC (UOW)
phdOffers.subject: Industry-embedded PhD on digital finance, compliance, tokenisation, and financial market innovation.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $70,000 p.a.; tuition offset; industry placement.
phdOffers.notes: UOW listed as DFCRC partner.

phdOffers.title: La Trobe Industry Research Scholarship – AI Agents for Quantitative Trading (Compliance & Risk)
phdOffers.subject: Industry-linked PhD developing autonomous AI agents for adaptive quantitative trading with emphasis on risk-adjusted returns, interpretability, compliance, ESG constraints, and regulatory adaptation.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $36,000 p.a. La Trobe Research Scholarship (2026 rate) for 3.5 years; fee-relief scholarship up to 4 years; relocation and thesis allowances.
phdOffers.notes: Expressions of interest open until filled; Bendigo campus.

phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) Banking & Finance – Funded Doctoral Program
phdOffers.subject: Full doctoral program in banking and finance including corporate finance, asset pricing, empirical corporate governance, and financial economics research training.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Vast majority of admitted students receive tuition waiver and stipend (~AUD $38–48K p.a. per UNSW Business FAQ); MPDBS pathway year also fully funded.
phdOffers.notes: EOI window 1 May–31 July annually for following-year February intake.

phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) Accounting, Auditing & Taxation – Funded Program
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in financial accounting, auditing, management accounting, and taxation with integrated research methods training.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Automatic scholarship consideration for most admitted HDR students; tuition waiver and ~AUD $38–48K stipend typical.
phdOffers.notes: Requires school Invitation to Apply after EOI.

phdOffers.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) Risk & Actuarial Studies – Funded Program
phdOffers.subject: PhD in actuarial studies, risk analytics, superannuation, regulatory capital, and investment/asset-liability modelling.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: MPDBS pathway fully funded (~AUD $38K); PhD continuation with tuition waiver and ~AUD $48K stipend for most students.
phdOffers.notes: EOI due 31 July for following-year cohort.

phdOffers.title: PhD in Finance with RTP/ANU Research Scholarship
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in finance at RSFAS; competitive RTP stipend and university research scholarship on admission application.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: RTP stipend AUD $39,069 p.a. (2026); ANU University Research Scholarship same base rate; tuition support via RTP offset.
phdOffers.notes: International applicants for scholarship Round 1 must apply by 31 August; GRE/GMAT required unless exempt.

phdOffers.title: PhD in Accounting with RTP/ANU Research Scholarship
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in accounting at the Research School of Accounting with integrated scholarship consideration on HDR admission.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: RTP/URS AUD $39,069 p.a. (2026); automatic consideration when applying for HDR admission.
phdOffers.notes: International scholarship deadline 31 August.

phdOffers.title: FBE Doctoral Program in Accounting (Funded)
phdOffers.subject: Five-year doctoral program (MCom coursework + PhD) in accounting with FBE doctoral stipend, tuition remission, and OSHC.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: FBE Doctoral Program Scholarship package: AUD $39,500 p.a. stipend (2026 RTP rate), full tuition, relocation grant, OSHC.
phdOffers.notes: Accounting Semester 1 entry closing date 31 August.

phdOffers.title: PhD in Banking & Finance / Accounting – RTP Stipend (International Round 3)
phdOffers.subject: Graduate research PhD in Monash Business School disciplines including banking, finance, accounting, and econometrics with RTP living allowance.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: RTP stipend AUD $37,145 p.a. (2026); tuition offset; relocation allowance if eligible.
phdOffers.notes: International Round 3/2026 closes 31 July; scholarship bundled with HDR course application.

phdOffers.title: International Research Training Program (iRTP) / iMQRES – Business & Finance PhD
phdOffers.subject: Competitive international graduate research scholarships for PhD across Macquarie Business School including finance, accounting, and economics.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $39,700 p.a. (2026 rate); tuition fee offset up to 3 years; travel concession.
phdOffers.notes: Applications open 15 June, close 31 July 2026 for Session 1 2027.

phdOffers.title: UQ Graduate School Scholarships (UQGSS/RTP) – Business & Finance PhD
phdOffers.subject: Competitive RTP living stipend for PhD across UQ Business School including finance, accounting, and governance topics.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $37,500 p.a. tax-free (2026); tuition fees; OSHC for international students; up to 3.5 years.
phdOffers.notes: EOI accepted year-round; assessed within published scholarship rounds after supervisor nomination.

phdOffers.title: PhD (Accountancy) with Research Training Program Scholarship
phdOffers.subject: Doctoral research in auditing/accountability/regulation, financial accounting, corporate governance, and social/environmental accountability.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: RTP stipend AUD $38,400 p.a. (2026); competitive; continuous intake with scholarship round deadlines.
phdOffers.notes: Applications continuous; scholarship closing dates apply separately.

phdOffers.title: Vice-Chancellor's PhD Scholarship (VCPS) 2027 – Accountancy
phdOffers.subject: Premier funded PhD pathway including accountancy, governance, and financial reporting research at RMIT.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $48,299 p.a. pro rata (2026 rate reference); tuition covered for domestic; international fee support per VCPS terms.
phdOffers.notes: 2027 round EOI open from 1 June 2026; domestic full application deadline 30 October, international 30 September.

phdOffers.title: RTP/DUPR PhD Scholarship – Business & Finance (2027 International Round)
phdOffers.subject: Government and university-funded PhD scholarships across Deakin Business School including finance, accounting, and economics.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: RTP or DUPR stipend (2026 RTP rate); tuition offset for competitive HDR applicants.
phdOffers.notes: 2027 international round opened 6 July 2026.

phdOffers.title: Business School Research Scholarship (BSRS) – PhD Finance & Accounting
phdOffers.subject: Competitive doctoral scholarship for full-time PhD/MPhil in Sydney Business School including finance, accounting, and governance research.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $42,754 p.a. (2026 RTP rate); up to 3.5 years; international tuition and SSAF covered if eligible.
phdOffers.notes: Next central RTP round for RP1/2 2027 closes 12 October 2026; BSRS competitive within Business School.

phdOffers.title: PhD – Accounting for Nature: Biodiversity Disclosure & Market Relevance (RTP)
phdOffers.subject: Funded PhD on decision-usefulness, measurement imbalance, and market relevance of biodiversity disclosure in accounting and financial reporting.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Preferred candidate may receive RTP scholarship during central scholarship round July 2026.
phdOffers.notes: Submit EOI during Central Scholarship round 1–31 July 2026.

phdOffers.title: Griffith Industry PhD Scholarship – Finance & Governance Projects
phdOffers.subject: Industry co-funded PhD scheme for collaborative finance, accounting, or governance research with external partners; advertised projects in Research Scholarships Table.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: AUD $50,000 p.a. for up to 3.5 years (industry PhD rate); minimum 60 days industry engagement.
phdOffers.notes: Requires industry partner commitment or selection for advertised project.

phdOffers.institution: Te Herenga Waka—Victoria University of Wellington
phdOffers.title: Wellington Doctoral Scholarship – Accounting & Commercial Law PhD
phdOffers.subject: Fully funded PhD pathway in School of Accounting and Commercial Law including financial governance, reporting, and commercial law research.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: NZD $32,000 p.a. stipend plus domestic tuition fees for up to 3 years; ~110 awards/year.
phdOffers.notes: Next round closes 1 November; July round closed 1 July.

phdOffers.institution: Te Herenga Waka—Victoria University of Wellington
phdOffers.title: Craig Buck Andrews PhD Scholarship in Financial Reporting & Financial Management
phdOffers.subject: Endowed PhD scholarship for thesis on financial reporting and/or financial management in developing countries, primary/concessionable industries.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: NZD $105,000 total (up to $35,000 p.a. for 3 years); one scholarship every three years.
phdOffers.notes: Page states not offered until November 2026 round.

phdOffers.title: University of Auckland Doctoral Scholarship – Faculty of Business & Economics
phdOffers.subject: Competitive fully funded PhD across accounting, finance, economics, and governance in Waipapa Taumata Rau Business School.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: NZD $35,468 p.a. (2026 CPI-adjusted); tuition up to 42 months; OSHC for international students.
phdOffers.notes: Faculty awards up to 13 UoADS in Business & Economics for 2026; next round apply by 1 August.

phdOffers.title: Business School Dean's Doctoral Scholarship – Leadership & Governance
phdOffers.subject: Faculty-funded PhD scholarship on pre-determined topics in productivity, innovation, leadership, governance, and internationalisation.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Up to NZD $33,000 p.a.; domestic and international; full-time and part-time.
phdOffers.notes: Requires pre-determined topic aligned to faculty strategic themes.

phdOffers.title: Barry Spicer and Owen G Glenn PhD Scholarship – Business Impact
phdOffers.subject: PhD scholarship for research with potential impact on business development in New Zealand and internationally, including finance and governance topics.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: Up to NZD $30,000 p.a. plus fees; full-time Business School PhD.
phdOffers.notes: Endowment-funded; apply via doctoral admission round.

phdOffers.title: University of Otago Doctoral Scholarship – Accounting & Finance PhD
phdOffers.subject: Main competitive/guaranteed doctoral scholarship for PhD in accounting, finance, or economics at Otago Business School.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: NZD $33,624 p.a. plus domestic tuition fee waiver for up to 36 months.
phdOffers.notes: Applications via eVision after doctoral admission; guaranteed for GPA 8+ with qualifying research degree.

phdOffers.title: AUT Doctoral Scholarship – Finance & Accounting PhD
phdOffers.subject: Competitive doctoral scholarship for PhD in AUT Business School including accounting, finance, and governance research areas.
phdOffers.fundingDetails: NZD $34,737 p.a. (2026) plus tuition and student services fee up to 3 years full-time.
phdOffers.notes: Urgent: round closes 15 July 2026.

skippedClosed.title: Ruth and Roger Hopkins PhD Scholarship in Accounting and Financial Governance
skippedClosed.reason: Closing date 1 July 2026 passed before as-of date.
